name: introspection
description: Create, migrate, deploy, and improve vertical agents on Introspection.

interface.longDescription: Create focused recipes from scratch or templates, migrate existing agents, deploy through the Introspection CLI, and improve from production evidence or a chosen target.
defaultPrompt: Use $introspection:create for a new agent, or $introspection:migrate to preserve an existing agent.
Use $introspection:improve with an optional focus, or omit it to start from production evidence.
Use $introspection:deploy to publish and verify a proven recipe.
